text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي، وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma atAAim man atAAamanee wasqi man saqanee.)
text.translated: (O Allah, feed him who fed me, and provide with drink him who provided me with drink.)

title: Invocation for someone who gives you drink or offers it to you
